zh.Brimeux, Pas-Calés, Heuts-d'Franche, Fra: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布利
zh.Bernieulles, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-Fra: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯波尼額洛斯
zh.Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France,: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Péronne de Brimeu於1183年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布利時，她的父親Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeu33歲，母親Elisabeth DE CREQUY34歲。她和Louis de Bernieulle I至少有1個兒子。她去世於1239年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯波尼額洛斯享年56歲。

zh-hans.Bernieulles, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-Fra: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯波尼額洛斯

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Péronne de Brimeu于1183年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布利时，她的父亲Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeu33岁，母亲Elisabeth DE CREQUY34岁。她和Louis de Bernieulle I至少有1个儿子。她去世于1239年在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯波尼額洛斯享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brimeu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: probably a variant, via Brimner, of the ethnic name Bremner , denoting someone from Brabant in the Low Countries.

variants.name: Bremner
meanings: Scottish: habitational name for someone from Brabant in the Low Countries, from Older Scots Brebner, Brabanare ‘native or inhabitant of Brabant’ (see Brabant and compare with the synonymous Brabazon ). Weavers from Brabant settled early at Aberdeen and on the east coast of Scotland.
German: habitational name for someone from the city of Bremen. This surname is very rare in Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Péronne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Pasquale, Angelo, Deno, Dino, Francesco, Orazio, Vito.
Italian: from an augmentative of the personal name   Pero  .

variants.name: Pero
meanings: Tuscan name, a short form of   Raniero .

en.lifeSummary: When Péronne de Brimeu was born in 1183, in Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeu, was 33 and her mother, Elisabeth DE CREQUY, was 34. She had at least 1 son with Louis de Bernieulle I. She died in 1239, in Bernieulles, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Péronne de Brimeu est née en 1183, à Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeu, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth DE CREQUY, avait 34 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Louis de Bernieulle I. Elle est décédée en 1239, à Bernieulles, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Péronne de Brimeu 1183 in Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeu 33 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth DE CREQUY 34. Sie hatte mit Louis de Bernieulle I mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1239 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Bernieulles, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Péronne de Brimeu è nata il nel 1183 nel Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeu, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Elisabeth DE CREQUY, aveva 34 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Louis de Bernieulle I. Morì nel 1239, nel Bernieulles, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Péronne de Brimeuが1183年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスブリメウックスで生まれた時，父Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeuは33歳，母Elisabeth DE CREQUYは34歳であった。彼女はLouis de Bernieulle Iとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1239年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスバーニーウレスで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Péronne de Brimeu(이)가 1183년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 브라임우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeu(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth DE CREQUY(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 Louis de Bernieulle I(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1239년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 버니우레스에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Péronne de Brimeu nasceu em 1183, em Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeu, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth DE CREQUY, tinha 34 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Louis de Bernieulle I. Ela faleceu em 1239, em Bernieulles, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Péronne de Brimeu родилась в 1183 г. в местности бримеукс, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeu было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth DE CREQUY, 34. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Louis de Bernieulle I. Она умерла в 1239 г. в местности бирниеуллесь, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Péronne de Brimeu nació en 1183, en Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Chevalier Enguerrand de Brimeu, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Elisabeth DE CREQUY, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Louis de Bernieulle I. Murió en 1239, en Bernieulles, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 56 años.
